questions.question: Name three of the four girls Mrs. Garrett was housemother to on the sitcom Facts of Life.
On Saturday Night Live, what comedian hosted "Mr. Robinson's Neighborhood," a spoof of Mr. Rogers?
What vocal jazz group scored a Grammy with "The Boy from New York City" in 1981?

Name the company whose ad campaign stated, "When it absolutely, positively has to be there overnight."
